banner.subtitle: Skinbloom Aesthetics - Your experts for anti-aging, PRP treatment, wrinkle reduction and lip augmentation in Switzerland.

about.subtitle: Your Beauty Deserves the Spotlight
about.borderText: At Skinbloom Aesthetics, your individual beauty is at the centre of everything we do. As a medical professional & naturopath, I offer treatments tailored to your unique needs to make your skin radiate.
about.description: Trust in our expertise and experience visible results based on natural processes. Our innovative methods for skin rejuvenation and care offer you the perfect mix of relaxation and effectiveness. Take the first step towards your best self.

members.name: Marianna
members.imgAlt: Marianna – Medical Aesthetics Specialist at Skinbloom Aesthetics
members.description:
With her solid medical training and her vision as Skinbloom's founder, Marianna leads the practice with maximum precision and professional depth. In 2016, she successfully completed her training as a medical specialist and gained valuable experience in both clinical and emergency medicine, ensuring safe and reliable treatment standards.
Since 2020, her focus has been on aesthetic medicine and minimally invasive treatments. Her approach combines technical excellence with a strong aesthetic eye to deliver naturally beautiful results and optimal skin health.
Her expertise is continuously deepened through her entrepreneurial background and ongoing academic path:
• Founder of Skinbloom – innovative concepts for holistic skin health.
• Studies in dentistry to expand her knowledge of facial anatomy and functional relationships.
• Specialization in precise injection techniques and minimally invasive aesthetics.
By combining practical experience, entrepreneurship, and continuous scientific education, Marianna provides treatments at the highest medical level. As a Medical Aesthetics Specialist, she stands for safety, precision, and holistic consultation for your ideal result.

members.name: Christina
members.imgAlt: Christina – Medical Skin Expert at Skinbloom Aesthetics
members.description:
At 39 years old and with a strong academic background, Christina brings extensive professional expertise to our team. She successfully completed her studies at the University of Health and Prevention in Berlin and has many years of experience in aesthetic medicine.
As a certified cosmetician and nutrition consultant, she follows a holistic approach: she combines deep knowledge of skin physiology with modern preventive medicine to achieve visible and sustainable results.
Her technical expertise in device-based cosmetic treatments is fully up to date:
• Qualified laser safety officer.
• V-NISSG certified for the professional use of:
• Ultrasound
• Radiofrequency
• Optical radiation (for effective skin rejuvenation and skin tightening)
Through these specialized qualifications, Christina ensures that all treatments are not only highly effective, but also carried out according to the highest legal safety standards. As a Medical Skin Expert, she supports you with confidence on your way to healthy, radiant skin.

items.text: I recently visited Skinbloom Aesthetics and am absolutely thrilled with the services. The team was very professional and friendly. My skin looks noticeably fresher and healthier after the treatment. I can only recommend this studio!
items.name: Laura S.

items.text: My jawline treatment at Skinbloom was a complete success! The results are incredibly natural and I felt very well taken care of throughout the entire treatment. Many thanks to the wonderful team!
items.name: Anna W.

items.text: I went to Skinbloom Aesthetics for a hyaluron treatment after another studio had ruined it. The team worked true miracles and my lips look beautiful again. Absolutely recommendable!
items.name: Sophie M.

items.text: The PRP treatment at Skinbloom was fantastic. Already after a few weeks I noticed a significant improvement in my skin texture. I'm super satisfied and will definitely come back!
items.name: Julia H.

items.text: I decided on the nasolabial fold treatment and I'm thrilled! The team was extremely competent and the results are very natural. I finally feel comfortable in my skin again. Thank you Skinbloom!

philosophy.title: Our
philosophy.description: At Skinbloom Aesthetics, we believe that true beauty lies in the harmony of aesthetics and wellbeing. Our mission is to enhance your natural radiance by offering individual treatments tailored to your needs and wishes. We use the most modern methods and high-quality products to achieve results that are not only visible but also tangible. Because your satisfaction and trust are our greatest concern.

faq.question: Most Modern Techniques
faq.answer: We use the latest techniques and technologies in aesthetic medicine to ensure safe and effective results. Your skin deserves only the best.

faq.question: Natural Results
faq.answer: Our mission is to enhance your natural radiance. We work precisely and individually to achieve results that appear harmonious and authentic.

faq.question: Individual Consultation
faq.answer: Every skin is unique. That's why we take the time for a thorough consultation to understand your needs and wishes and choose the best treatment for you.

items.question: How does a typical treatment session proceed?
items.answer: After an individual consultation and skin analysis, we begin with the treatment tailored to your skin type and needs. We place special emphasis on hygiene, relaxation and high-quality products. At the end, you will receive care tips for home.

items.question: Which treatments are suitable for my skin type?
items.answer: Every skin is unique, so we carry out a comprehensive analysis before the treatment. Whether moisturising treatments, anti-aging therapies or clarifying applications – we recommend the best option for your skin.

items.question: How long do the results of lip treatment last?
items.answer: The duration of results depends on the type of treatment. In general, results from hyaluron treatments last 6 to 12 months. Regular touch-ups can extend the results.

items.question: Are the treatments painful?
items.answer: Most treatments are gentle and well-tolerated. With minimally invasive procedures such as microneedling or lip treatments, a slight pulling or pressure sensation may occur, which quickly subsides. We offer a numbing cream upon request.

items.question: What is a jawline treatment?
items.answer: A jawline treatment serves to define and contour the jawline. With the targeted injection of hyaluron or other fillers, we can harmonise the face, emphasise the jaw area and create a younger, firmer appearance.

items.question: What is a hyaluron treatment?
items.answer: A hyaluron treatment is a gentle method to restore volume and moisture in the skin. Hyaluronic acid is a natural component of the skin that binds moisture and tightens the skin. During the treatment, a high-quality hyaluron gel is precisely injected into the desired areas to smooth wrinkles or build up volume.

items.question: What is a PRP treatment and how does it work?
items.answer: The PRP treatment (Platelet Rich Plasma) is an innovative method that uses your own blood plasma. A small amount of blood is taken, centrifuged, and the concentrated plasma with its rich growth factors is injected into the skin. This treatment stimulates cell regeneration, improves skin texture and provides a radiant, younger appearance.

items.question: Are the treatments suitable for sensitive skin?
items.answer: Yes, our treatments are also suitable for sensitive skin. We use gentle products and techniques specifically adapted for sensitive skin. Let us discuss your skin needs in advance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Do you have questions about our treatments or would you like to make an appointment? We are here for you! Contact us by phone, email or via the contact form. Our experienced team is happy to advise you personally and find the best solution for your individual needs. We look forward to hearing from you.

alerts.successText: Thank you for your message. We will contact you soon!

contact.contactUsText: We offer customised treatments for anti-aging, wrinkle reduction and lip augmentation. With state-of-the-art technology and personal consultation, we ensure natural and long-lasting results.

faqItems.question: Most Modern Techniques
faqItems.answer: We use the latest techniques and technologies in aesthetic medicine to ensure safe and effective results. Your skin deserves only the best.

faqItems.question: Natural Results
faqItems.answer: At Skinbloom Aesthetics, natural results are at the heart of everything we do. Our treatments are designed to gently enhance your individual beauty – without looking artificial. The goal: a fresh, harmonious appearance that suits you and lets your personality shine.

faqItems.question: Individual Consultation
faqItems.answer: Every skin is unique – just like your wishes. That's why we take the time for a personal and thorough consultation. Together we analyse your needs and develop a tailored treatment concept that suits you – honest, transparent and with professional expertise.

footer.description: Your partner for professional anti-aging and aesthetic treatments in Basel. We offer individual solutions tailored to your needs that deliver natural, long-lasting results.

items.name: Jawline
items.description: In the jawline treatment, hyaluronic acid is injected along the jawline to make it appear clearer and more defined. The procedure emphasises facial contours and can make the jawline appear firmer and more youthful.

items.name: Chin Augmentation
items.description: In chin augmentation, hyaluronic acid is precisely injected into the chin to optimise its shape. This can serve to lengthen the chin, add volume or balance asymmetries, making the face appear more harmonious.

items.name: Lip Wrinkles
items.description: This treatment aims to smooth the fine lines around the lips. With hyaluronic acid, the wrinkles are filled in so that the skin looks smoother and plumper again.

items.name: Lip Augmentation
items.description: Here, hyaluronic acid is injected into the lips to give them more volume, shape and definition. This technique is used to enlarge thin lips or give them more fullness while maintaining a natural appearance.

items.name: Marionette Lines
items.description: Marionette lines run downward from the corners of the mouth to the chin. By injecting hyaluronic acid, these lines are softened and the face looks fresher and friendlier.

items.name: Cheek Augmentation
items.description: In this treatment, hyaluronic acid is injected into the cheeks to compensate for volume loss or to emphasise the cheekbones more strongly. This gives the face a youthful fullness and defines the cheek area.

items.name: Nasolabial Fold
items.description: These lines run from the nostrils to the corners of the mouth. With hyaluronic acid, these lines are gently filled to smooth the wrinkles and make the face appear softer and less tired.

items.name: Hylase
items.description: Hylase is an enzyme that specifically breaks down and dissolves hyaluronic acid. It is used to correct unwanted results from hyaluron treatments or to gently remove excess hyaluron. The treatment is precise and enables a rapid reversal of unwanted effects.

items.name: Mesotherapy
items.description: Mesotherapy is a minimally invasive treatment in which individually tailored active ingredient cocktails are injected directly into the skin. These contain vitamins, minerals, amino acids and hyaluronic acid to intensively nourish the skin, promote circulation and improve skin structure.

items.name: Skinbooster
items.description: Skinboosters are special hyaluronic acid injections that penetrate deep into the skin and provide intensive moisture. They improve skin elasticity, reduce fine lines and provide a fresh, radiant complexion.

items.name: Profhilo
items.description: Profhilo is an innovative anti-aging treatment that uses highly concentrated hyaluronic acid to improve skin structure from within. It stimulates the body's own collagen and elastin production, tightening and rejuvenating the skin.

items.name: Marionette Lines
items.description: Marionette lines run downward from the corners of the mouth to the chin. By injecting hyaluronic acid, these lines are softened and the face looks fresher and friendlier.

items.name: Fat Dissolving Injection
items.description: The fat dissolving injection is a minimally invasive treatment for the targeted reduction of stubborn fat deposits. Through an injection of active ingredients that dissolve fat cells, problem areas such as double chin, abdomen or hips can be gently modelled.

items.name: PRP Hair Loss Therapy
items.description: In PRP therapy (Platelet Rich Plasma), your own platelet-rich plasma is obtained from the blood and injected into the scalp. The contained growth factors stimulate hair follicles, promote hair growth and strengthen hair structure.

items.name: Vampire Lifting / PRP
items.description: Vampire lifting is a natural anti-aging treatment in which your own plasma stimulates skin regeneration. The treatment improves skin elasticity, reduces wrinkles and gives the face a fresh, youthful appearance.

items.name: Infusion Therapy
items.description: Infusion therapy supplies the body directly through the vein with important nutrients, vitamins and antioxidants. It improves wellbeing, strengthens the immune system and promotes cell regeneration.

items.name: Hydrafacial
items.description: Hydrafacial is a gentle, non-invasive treatment that deep cleanses, peels, hydrates and supplies the skin with antioxidants. The method removes impurities, intensively supplies the skin with moisture and leaves a fresh, radiant complexion.

items.name: Chemical Peels
items.description: Chemical peels improve the skin's appearance through targeted exfoliation with fruit acids or other active ingredients. They reduce pigmentation spots, acne scars and uneven complexion and promote cell renewal for fresher, smoother skin.

items.name: Radiofrequency Needling
items.description: Radiofrequency needling combines fine needles with heat energy to work deep into the skin. The treatment tightens slack skin areas, promotes the body's own collagen formation and visibly reduces wrinkles and scars.

items.name: Carboxy Therapy
items.description: In carboxy therapy, medical CO₂ gas is injected under the skin to improve circulation and stimulate cell metabolism. The treatment is visibly effective for dark circles, scars, cellulite and sagging.

items.name: HIFU Ultrasound
items.description: HIFU (High Intensity Focused Ultrasound) is a non-invasive lifting method that transfers focused ultrasound energy to the deeper skin layers. It provides long-lasting tightening of the face, neck and décolleté and stimulates collagen production – without any surgery.

items.name: Microneedling
items.description: In microneedling, fine needles create controlled microchannels in the skin that stimulate the body's own collagen and elastin production. The treatment minimises scars, refines the skin's appearance and improves texture.
